extraction.one_line_summary: BODZANA Filippo won from breakaway on home Veneto roads, while ROGLIĆ attacked final climb to take 2nd GC from ALMEIDA by 28 seconds
tactical_patterns: INEOS waited until third-from-last climb to pull, letting breakaway gain six minutes before mountain train commitment revealed conservative pacing strategy.
ROGLIĆ positioned rear of group before final climb but attacked decisively when VINE descent mistake isolated ALMEIDA from support.
THOMAS isolated from teammates early but matched ROGLIĆ's attack meter-for-meter, showing form stability without team support dependency.
Israel Premier Tech forced to chase after BODZANA/ZANA move, wasting energy while INEOS controlled tempo for THOMAS.

rider_signals.ROGLIĆ Primož: positive: lurked at back raising fitness doubts then attacked final climb to gain 28 seconds on Almeida when support evaporated
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: negative: lost 28 seconds and GC position despite only 11-second deficit pre-stage, vulnerable when Vine made descent error
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: rode isolated from teammates but matched Roglić's accelerations without budging, birthday ride showed self-sufficiency
rider_signals.DUNBAR Eddie: positive: moved up GC despite losing time, stayed with leaders longer than expected without team support
rider_signals.VINE Jay: negative: descent mistake left Almeida exposed at critical moment, tactical error cost teammate GC position
rider_signals.PINO Thibaut: negative: second heartbreak sprint loss in three days from breakaway, pattern of failing final 200m execution
rider_signals.HEALY Ben: negative: attacked early then dropped immediately, surrendering KOM jersey without mounting credible defense
